indications.text:
1.1 Treatment of Asthma
ASMANEX® TWISTHALER® is indicated for the maintenance treatment of asthma as prophylactic
therapy in patients 4 years of age and older.
Important Limitations of Use
ASMANEX TWISTHALER is NOT indicated for the relief of acute bronchospasm.
ASMANEX TWISTHALER is NOT indicated i...
